_help_afterRun: Options: close (quit game), menu (return to main menu), loop (start a new run immediately)
_help_character: Options: random, ironclad, silent, regent, defect, necrobinder
_help_seed: Hex seed string to use for every run (e.g. 1A2B3C4D). Leave empty to generate a new random seed each run.
_help_verboseDebug: Set to true to print detailed AutoSlay diagnostics to godot.log. Default false — enable only when debugging crashes.
